2605.28301.title: Better Accuracies, Worse Reasoning: A Step-Level Audit of Medical Chain-of-Thought Distillation
2605.28301.paper_summary: Chain-of-thought (CoT) distillation trains a smaller model to imitate a teacher's reasoning trace, but it is typically evaluated by final-answer metrics including accuracy. We ask whether gains in answer quality are accompanied by improvements in the trace. In medical QA, where short answer options can leave a richer clinical justification under-specified, a Qwen3-8B student distilled from a DeepSeek-V3-family teacher improves on MedQA-USMLE answer metrics (SC@64 74.7% to 84.4%; expected calibration error (ECE) 0.096 to 0.034). Yet under a Kimi-K2.6 style-blind LLM-judge audit, its error rate over non-abstained steps rises from 30.6% to 50.3%. In this primary medical setting, answer quality and trace factuality move in opposite directions. This before--after pattern persists across evaluators, teacher strengths, student scales and families, medical benchmarks, and style, segmentation, and answer-correctness controls. A 150-step blinded audit by a clinical expert reproduces the same ordering. Boundary checks narrow the scope of the claim: the risk appears when a compact answer under-constrains the rationale and a capable student can imitate expert-like form without reliably grounding each local claim. Standard answer metrics and aggregate hedging rates do not reveal the shift. When such traces are released or reused, answer-level metrics alone are insufficient.
2605.28301.paper_summary_zh: Chain-of-thought (CoT) 蒸餾訓練一個較小的模型以模仿教師的推理過程，但通常是通過最終答案指標來評估，包括準確性。我們詢問答案質量的提升是否伴隨著推理過程的改善。在醫療問答中，短答案選項可能會使臨床理由的闡述不夠充分，從 DeepSeek-V3 家族教師蒸餾出來的 Qwen3-8B 學生在 MedQA-USMLE 答案指標上有所改善（SC@64 從 74.7% 提升至 84.4%；預期校準誤差（ECE）從 0.096 降至 0.034）。然而，在 Kimi-K2.6 風格盲評的 LLM-judge 審核下，其非放棄步驟的錯誤率從 30.6% 上升至 50.3%。在這一主要醫療環境中，答案質量和推理事實性呈現相反的趨勢。這種前後模式在評估者、教師優勢、學生規模和家族、醫療基準，以及風格、分段和答案正確性控制中持續存在。一位臨床專家的 150 步盲審重現了相同的排序。邊界檢查縮小了主張的範圍：當一個簡潔的答案未能充分約束理由時，風險就會出現，而一個有能力的學生可以模仿專家般的形式，但無法可靠地為每個局部主張提供基礎。標準答案指標和聚合對沖率並未顯示出這一變化。當這些推理過程被釋放或重用時，僅僅依賴答案級別的指標是不夠的。
2605.28301.author: Zhaoyang Jiang et.al.
2605.28301.authors: Zhaoyang Jiang, Xuanqi Peng, Fei Teng, Zhizhong Fu, Yunsoo Kim, Jiacong Mi, Zicheng Li, Honghan Wu
